engine.description: Optional engine hint (`google` / `bing` / `brave` / `perplexity` / `kagi`). When unset, host uses its default-configured engine. Engine must be in `Capabilities.webResearch.engines`.

language.description: Result language hint (e.g., `'en'`, `'fr'`, `'ja'`). Host MAY ignore for engines without language gating.
